examples: And, of course, try to eat biodynamic food.
In Germany and France biodynamic wineries have existed widely for some time.
To introduce some biodynamic principles into your life, Parsons suggests we try to live more rhythmically.
For model-actor-chef-aristo turned biodynamic farmer Daniel de la Falaise, finding your calling late in life runs in the family.
Raincity Grill (1193 Denman St), a slick city favourite, serves "biodynamic greens", apple jellies, sunchokes and "rhubarb clouds", all sourced from local suppliers.
